description: Baseline: all 7 scripts benchmarked. json-vis=54s (BOTTLENECK), mr-plan-eval=22s, ctx-inject=503ms, read-turn=87ms, envelope=75ms, watch-agent=79ms

asi.bottleneck: json-vis at 54s for 12MB JSONL — processes line-by-line with jq calls per line
optimization_targets: mr-plan-eval (22s — mostly API wait, minimal script overhead)
